question.label: Stretch now
question.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
question.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

assessment.note: She named mentoring as work that matters to her, which is a mild positive signal on growth and engagement; also surfaces mentoring as a concrete thread to deepen.

new_queue.label: Mentoring meaning

new_queue.label: Current direction
new_queue.name: What kind of growth are you actually looking for next?

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make space for that growth?

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Where do you want to focus first before we talk again?
